# Dataset Card: <Dataset Name>

Use this template only when Alexandros actually bundles or recommends a
dataset. Tiny CI fixtures should be labeled as test fixtures, not as useful
pretraining data.

## Summary

- Dataset source:
- License:
- Allowed use:
- Redistribution status:

## Contents

Describe languages, domains, size, split strategy, and format.

## Processing

Document filtering, deduplication, PII handling, tokenizer, packing, and any
benchmark decontamination.

## Risks

List known bias, privacy, copyright, contamination, and quality risks.

## Versioning

Record dataset version, scripts, checksums, and date created.
